/// FIXME: This entire module needs a rewrite once the new storage engine lands.
pub struct CacheLayer {
    entries: std::collections::HashMap<String, Vec<u8>>,
}

impl CacheLayer {
    /// Creates a new cache with the given capacity.
    ///
    /// FIXME: The eviction policy is naive; replace with LRU once the
    /// dependency is approved.
    pub fn new(capacity: usize) -> Self {
        Self {
            entries: std::collections::HashMap::with_capacity(capacity),
        }
    }

    /// Inserts a value into the cache.
    ///
    /// FIXME: handle key collisions properly instead of silently overwriting.
    pub fn insert(&mut self, key: String, value: Vec<u8>) {
        self.entries.insert(key, value);
    }

    pub fn get(&self, key: &str) -> Option<&[u8]> {
        self.entries.get(key).map(|v| v.as_slice())
    }
}
